# AI Coding Agent Instructions for @jsenv/core

The canonical agent instructions for this repository live in **`.agents/`** at the repo root.

- **General instructions and coding conventions**: [`.agents/instructions.md`](../../.agents/instructions.md)
- **Skills** (task-specific workflows): [`.agents/skills/`](../../.agents/skills/)
  - [`testing`](../../.agents/skills/testing/SKILL.md) — how to write and run tests
  - [`new-component`](../../.agents/skills/new-component/SKILL.md) — creating a new UI component

Please read `.agents/instructions.md` before starting any task in this repository.
